physical_anchor: Weathered, compact mountain build — sinewy rather than broad, with sun-darkened skin, a close-cropped grey-shot beard, and deep-set eyes that hold a steady, unblinking regard. Moves with slow economy; habitually rests a calloused hand flat on his chest or on a guest's shoulder when speaking a word that matters.
vocal_quality: Low, even baritone with a dry, unhurried tempo and a resonant chest register that never rises, shaped by Quranic cadence and long silences.
social_presence: Occupies a room with quiet moral gravity — the still point others turn toward, radiating warmth to the guest at his hearth and an iron, unraised authority to anyone who would violate it.
